title: Ledger
description: The SEPARATE materialized multi-record shape written by ledger_merge.py to ledger.json -- a per-segment status/reason/rounds map assembled from every runs/ledger.d/*.json fragment. Each value under `segments` composes against the SAME status-free base as ledger-fragment.schema.json (never against ledger-fragment.schema.json itself), so the wider status enum here -- which includes `stale` -- never conflicts with the fragment schema's narrower enum. `stale` is a status ledger_merge.py COMPUTES when building this map (a cache-key mismatch against a converged fragment); it is never found in any actual on-disk fragment.
